product.name: CloudSync Pro
product.tagline: Enterprise file sync and collaboration, simplified.

opening_scripts.script: Hi [Name], this is [Rep Name] from CloudSync Pro. I noticed your company recently expanded to [X] employees — congratulations! I'm reaching out because companies at your growth stage often hit a wall with file sharing and collaboration. Do you have 2 minutes for me to share how we've helped similar companies like [reference] save 15 hours per week on file management?

Hi [Name], thanks for reaching out about CloudSync Pro! I saw you were looking at our [specific plan/feature]. Before I dive in, I'd love to understand your current setup — what are you using for file sharing and collaboration today, and what's the biggest headache with it?

Hi [Name], it's [Rep Name] from CloudSync Pro. Last time we spoke, you mentioned [specific pain point]. I wanted to share a quick case study from [similar company] who had the exact same challenge — they reduced their file sync issues by 90% within the first month. Would you like to hear how they did it?

Hi [Name], great demo yesterday! I wanted to follow up on the [specific feature] you were excited about. I've also put together a custom ROI analysis based on your team size of [X] — it shows a potential savings of $[Y] per year. Shall I walk you through it?

questions: What's your current spend on file storage and collaboration tools?
Do you have a budget allocated for improving your team's collaboration infrastructure?
If we could show a 3x ROI, would the investment be something you could approve?
Who else on your team would be involved in evaluating a solution like this?
What does the decision-making process typically look like for tools at your company?
Would it be helpful to include your IT lead or CTO in our next conversation?
How are you handling file sharing across teams today?
What happens when team members need to collaborate on the same document?
Have you experienced any data loss or version control issues?
Is there a specific deadline or event driving this evaluation?
How soon would you need a solution in place?
Are you evaluating other solutions alongside us?

value_propositions.headline: 10x Faster File Sync
value_propositions.detail: Our delta-sync technology only transfers changed bytes, not entire files. Average sync time: 0.3 seconds vs. industry average of 3+ seconds.
value_propositions.proof_point: TechCorp reduced their file sync wait time by 94% after switching from Dropbox Business.
value_propositions.when_to_use: When prospect mentions slow sync, productivity loss, or frustration with current tool speed

value_propositions.headline: Bank-Grade Security, Built In
value_propositions.detail: End-to-end encryption (AES-256), SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, HIPAA ready. Zero-knowledge architecture means we can't see your files even if we wanted to.
value_propositions.proof_point: HealthFirst, a healthcare provider with 500+ employees, passed their HIPAA audit in half the time after implementing CloudSync Pro.
value_propositions.when_to_use: When prospect mentions security concerns, compliance requirements, or regulated industry

value_propositions.headline: Works With Everything You Already Use
value_propositions.detail: Native integrations with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira, Salesforce, and 200+ other tools via API. No workflow disruption.
value_propositions.proof_point: DesignStudio connected CloudSync Pro to their existing Figma + Slack workflow in under 30 minutes.
value_propositions.when_to_use: When prospect worried about tool switching costs or integration complexity

value_propositions.headline: Save $45K+ Per Year for a 100-Person Team
value_propositions.detail: Consolidates 3-4 separate tools (file sharing, collaboration, backup, compliance) into one platform. Average customer saves 40% on their total collaboration stack cost.
value_propositions.proof_point: RetailMax eliminated Dropbox, WeTransfer, and a separate backup solution, saving $67K annually.
value_propositions.when_to_use: When prospect mentions budget constraints or multiple tool subscriptions

closing_techniques.name: The Trial Close
closing_techniques.script: Based on everything we've discussed, I think the Professional plan would be the perfect fit. We offer a 14-day free trial with full features — no credit card required. Would you like me to set that up for your team today?
closing_techniques.when_to_use: When prospect is interested but hasn't committed
closing_techniques.follow_up: I'll send over the trial link right after this call, along with a quick-start guide. Can we schedule a 15-minute check-in for next Tuesday to see how things are going?

closing_techniques.name: The ROI Close
closing_techniques.script: You mentioned your team spends about [X hours] per week on file management issues. At your team's average hourly rate, that's roughly $[Y] per month in lost productivity. CloudSync Pro would cost you $[Z] per month — so you'd be saving $[Y-Z] every month, starting from day one. Does that math make sense to move forward?
closing_techniques.when_to_use: When prospect is price-sensitive but has acknowledged pain points
closing_techniques.follow_up: I can send you a detailed ROI spreadsheet customized for your team size. Would that help in presenting this to your leadership?

closing_techniques.name: The Urgency Close
closing_techniques.script: I should mention — we're running our annual promotion this month where you lock in 20% off for the first year. That ends on [date]. If we get you started before then, you'd save an additional $[amount] over the year.
closing_techniques.when_to_use: When prospect is interested but dragging feet on timeline
closing_techniques.follow_up: Even if you start the trial now, you can always upgrade before the promo ends. Want me to reserve that pricing for you?

closing_techniques.name: The Assumptive Close
closing_techniques.script: Great, it sounds like CloudSync Pro checks all your boxes. Let me walk you through the onboarding process — typically takes about 48 hours for a team your size. Would Monday or Wednesday work better for your team's kickoff?
closing_techniques.when_to_use: When prospect has given multiple buying signals and seems ready
closing_techniques.follow_up: I'll prepare a custom onboarding plan for your team and send it over today.

our_advantages: Better admin controls and audit logging
Lower cost at scale (saves 30% for 100+ users)
competitor_comparisons.talk_track: Dropbox is great for personal use, but when teams scale past 50 people, they often hit walls with admin controls, compliance, and sync performance. That's exactly where CloudSync Pro shines — we're built from the ground up for enterprise teams.

our_advantages: No IT admin required for basic setup
their_advantages: Already included in enterprise Microsoft licenses
competitor_comparisons.talk_track: SharePoint is powerful but complex. We hear from a lot of customers who have SharePoint but their teams don't actually use it because it's too complicated. CloudSync Pro gives you the same capabilities with a learning curve of minutes, not months.

Box is a solid platform, especially for heavily regulated industries. But our customers who switched from Box consistently tell us two things: CloudSync Pro is faster and their teams actually enjoy using it. User adoption is often the biggest challenge with these tools.

our_advantages: Better compliance and data residency controls
No vendor lock-in on file formats
competitor_comparisons.talk_track: Google Workspace is fantastic for real-time document editing, and we actually integrate with it. Where CloudSync Pro adds value is for teams that need robust offline access, enterprise-grade compliance, and the ability to work with any file type — not just Google formats.
